mapper.select:
SELECT m.id, m.company_name AS companyName, COALESCE(m.contact_name, u.nickname, u.username, '负责人') AS contact, COALESCE(m.contact_phone, u.phone) AS phone, CONCAT( IFNULL(m.province, ''), IFNULL(m.city, ''), IFNULL(m.district, ''), IFNULL(m.address, '') ) AS address, m.license_url AS licenseUrl, m.legal_person AS legalPerson, m.credit_code AS creditCode, m.qualification_urls AS qualificationUrls, m.audit_status AS auditStatus, m.audit_reason AS reason, m.publish_status AS publishStatus, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report_info r WHERE r.type = 'MERCHANT' AND r.target_id = m.user_id ) AS reportCount, m.update_time AS submittedAt FROM merchant_profile m LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( m.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username, '') LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND m.audit_status = #{status}
ORDER BY m.update_time DESC
